port.markdownDescription:
TCP port to listen on for events from Fluent Bit's forward output

TCP port where Log10x listens for events sent by Fluent Bit's `forward` output. Match this against the `Port` in your Fluent Bit `[OUTPUT]` block (`Name forward`). (Default: 24224)

path.markdownDescription:
Unix domain socket path to listen on (Linux/macOS)

When set, Log10x listens on a Unix domain socket instead of TCP â€” useful on Linux/macOS to avoid TCP overhead. Configure Fluent Bit's `forward` output with `Unix_Path` set to a matching path. Ignored on Windows.

messageField.markdownDescription:
Name of the JSON field carrying the original log line

Name of the field in each Fluent Bit record that contains the actual log message text. The default (`log`) matches Fluent Bit's `tail` input convention for container and file logs. Set to e.g. `message` if your sources emit the log line under a different key. (Default: log)

host.markdownDescription:
TCP host of the Fluent Bit forward input receiving processed events

Hostname or IP where Fluent Bit's `forward` input is listening for processed events from Log10x. Pairs with `fluentbitOutputPort`. (Default: 127.0.0.1)

port.markdownDescription:
TCP port of the Fluent Bit forward input receiving processed events

TCP port where Fluent Bit's `forward` input is listening for processed events from Log10x. MUST differ from the port Log10x's own Forward input listens on (default `24224`) or the two would collide on the same socket. (Default: 24225)

path.markdownDescription:
Unix domain socket path of the Fluent Bit forward input (Linux/macOS)

Optional Unix domain socket path for Fluent Bit's `forward` input. When set, takes precedence over `fluentbitOutputHost` / `fluentbitOutputPort`. Linux/macOS only â€” ignored on Windows.

encodeType.markdownDescription:
Output format when outputFields are set. Possible values: [json, delimited]

Specifies how the combined output (main event field plus outputFields) is encoded when writing back to Fluent Bit. Possible values: - **json**: formats all fields as a JSON object - **delimited**: formats field values separated by the output delimiter Only takes effect when fluentbitOutputFields is set. (Default: delimited)
